title: A to Z Swim&Splash Inflatable Pool Lounger, 183 cm x 69 cm, Multi-Colour, Age 14+, for Pool Beach Garden
features: VERSATILE USE: Suitable for pools, beaches, and gardens, this inflatable lounger provides comfortable floating relaxation for users aged 14 and above
GENEROUS SIZE: Measures 183 cm in length and 69 cm in width, offering ample space for comfortable lounging on water
COLOUR OPTIONS: Available in three vibrant colours - yellow, blue, and red, allowing for personal style preference
PORTABLE DESIGN: Easily deflates for compact storage and comes in a convenient carry bag for transport
DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: Made with quality materials designed for water use, featuring ribbed surface pattern for enhanced comfort
description: Product Description Make a splash this summer with the A to Z Swim&Splash Inflatable Pool Lounger! This versatile lounger measures 183 cm x 69 cm, providing ample space for comfortable relaxation. Available in vibrant yellow, blue, and red colours, this inflatable lounger adds a fun pop of colour to your aquatic adventures. Perfect for multiple settings - whether you're lounging by the pool, catching some sun at the beach, or creating a relaxing spot in your garden. The lounger features a practical design with ribbed channels for enhanced stability and comfort while floating. Suitable for ages 14 and above, it's ideal for teens and adults looking to unwind on the water. The compact design makes it easy to deflate and store when not in use, while the durable construction ensures it's ready for your next water-based relaxation session. The convenient packaging includes a single lounger that's ready to inflate and enjoy, making it an essential accessory for your summer leisure activities. Safety Warning Warning: Only to be used in water in which the child is within it's depth and under adult supervision. This is not a Life Saving Device
